commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl delete pod nixl-sig -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1; echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/nixl-sig.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/nixl-sig.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs nixl-sig 2>&1 | head -50'
